title: Marseille, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Marseille, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Marseille is a city in Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur with a population of 873,000. France’s oldest city and largest Mediterranean port, known for its vibrant multicultural atmosphere and stunning calanques.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
